title: VanillaPixels
description: A vanilla-friendly texture enhancement pack that improves clarity, detail, and aesthetics while preserving the original Minecraft style.
body:
![VanillaPixelsLogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4a21aed06cf152ca8eeb1648013b489e845cecf_0.webp)


## _This pack is made to make Minecraft look a bit cooler and nicer without sacrificing its **iconic** vanilla-aesthetic!_

##
##
For just the ingame texture changes without the gui overhaul go download: [Plain & Precious](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/plainandprecious)

For just the gui update go download: [Round Up](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/roundup)

Pack inspired by: [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
